children.heading: .—Administrator
children.label: 1 .—Administrator
children.text: The term “Administrator” means the Administrator of General Services.

children.label: i
children.text: established by statute or reorganization plan;

children.label: ii
children.text: established or utilized by the President; or

children.label: iii
children.text: established or utilized by one or more agencies.

children.label: i
children.text: a committee that is composed wholly of full-time, or permanent part-time, officers or employees of the Federal Government; and

children.label: ii
children.text: a committee that is created by the National Academy of Sciences or the National Academy of Public Administration.

children.heading: .—Agency
children.label: 3 .—Agency
children.text: The term “agency” has the meaning given the term in .section 551 of this title

children.heading: .—Presidential advisory committee
children.label: 4 .—Presidential advisory committee
children.text: The term “Presidential advisory committee” means an advisory committee that advises the President.
